title: CLARITY Act could help CFTC deal with prediction markets: Lawyer
summary: CLARITY Act could help CFTC deal with prediction markets: Lawyer
briefing: According to one lawyer testifying before a House subcommittee hearing, the CLARITY Act could grant the CFTC the authority it needs to address the “explosive growth of prediction markets.”

title: Movement Labs files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy after months of MOVE token turmoil
summary: Movement Labs files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy after months of MOVE token turmoil
briefing: The blockchain developer will continue operating under court supervision as it restructures following a market-making scandal, a co-founder’s suspension, and exchange delistings that rocked the project.

title: Pavel Durov says Telegram to roll out native Gram crypto wallet
